yahboom_md_iic_init.message0: Initialize I2C motor driver %1 Address %2 Motor type %3
yahboom_md_iic_init.tooltip: Initialize Yahboom I2C four-way motor driver board, set I2C address and motor type

yahboom_md_iic_set_deadzone.message0: I2C motor driver %1 Set dead zone %2
yahboom_md_iic_set_deadzone.tooltip: Set the motor dead zone value

yahboom_md_iic_set_pulse_line.message0: I2C motor driver %1 Set the number of pulse lines %2
yahboom_md_iic_set_pulse_line.tooltip: Set the number of magnetic ring pulse lines

yahboom_md_iic_set_pulse_phase.message0: I2C motor driver %1 Set reduction ratio %2

yahboom_md_iic_set_wheel_diameter.message0: I2C motor driver %1 Set wheel diameter (mm) %2

yahboom_md_iic_control_speed.message0: I2C motor driver %1 Speed control M1 %2 M2 %3 M3 %4 M4 %5
yahboom_md_iic_control_speed.tooltip: Control 4-way motor speed (encoder motor required), range -1000~1000

yahboom_md_iic_control_pwm.message0: I2C motor driver %1 PWM control M1 %2 M2 %3 M3 %4 M4 %5

yahboom_md_iic_encoder_offset.message0: I2C motor driver %1 Get 10ms encoder offset %2
yahboom_md_iic_encoder_offset.tooltip: Read the 10ms real-time encoder offset of the specified motor

yahboom_md_iic_encoder_total.message0: I2C motor driver %1 Get total encoder count %2
yahboom_md_iic_encoder_total.tooltip: Read the total encoder count of the specified motor

yahboom_md_usart_init.message0: Initialize serial port motor driver %1 Serial port %2 Motor type %3
yahboom_md_usart_init.tooltip: Initialize Yahboom serial port four-way motor driver board

yahboom_md_usart_set_deadzone.message0: Serial motor driver %1 Set dead zone %2
yahboom_md_usart_set_deadzone.tooltip: Set the motor dead zone value

yahboom_md_usart_set_pulse_line.message0: Serial motor driver %1 Set the number of pulse lines %2
yahboom_md_usart_set_pulse_line.tooltip: Set the number of magnetic ring pulse lines

yahboom_md_usart_set_pulse_phase.message0: Serial motor driver %1 Set reduction ratio %2

yahboom_md_usart_set_wheel_diameter.message0: Serial motor driver %1 Set wheel diameter (mm) %2

yahboom_md_usart_set_pid.message0: Serial motor driver %1 Set PID P %2 I %3 D %4

yahboom_md_usart_set_upload_data.message0: Serial motor driver %1 Data reporting Total encoder %2 10ms encoder %3 Speed %4
yahboom_md_usart_set_upload_data.tooltip: Configure the data type reported by the motor module: total encoder count, 10ms real-time encoder, speed (mm/s)

yahboom_md_usart_control_speed.message0: Serial motor driver %1 Speed control M1 %2 M2 %3 M3 %4 M4 %5
yahboom_md_usart_control_speed.tooltip: Control 4-way motor speed (encoder motor required), range -1000~1000

yahboom_md_usart_control_pwm.message0: Serial motor driver %1 PWM control M1 %2 M2 %3 M3 %4 M4 %5

yahboom_md_usart_data_available.tooltip: Check whether the data returned by the motor module is received (data is automatically received in the loop)

yahboom_md_usart_parse_data.tooltip: Parse the received data and clear the receive flag, should be called after checking that the data is available

yahboom_md_usart_encoder_offset.message0: Serial motor driver %1 Get 10ms encoder offset %2
yahboom_md_usart_encoder_offset.tooltip: Get the 10ms real-time encoder offset of the specified motor

yahboom_md_usart_encoder_total.message0: Serial motor driver %1 Get the total encoder count %2
yahboom_md_usart_encoder_total.tooltip: Get the total encoder count for the specified motor

yahboom_md_usart_speed.tooltip: Get the current speed of the specified motor (mm/s)
